title: glechoma subhastata
intro: Glechoma subhastata, also known as Creeping Sage or Chinese Glechoma, is a type of perennial herb native to China and Eastern Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Glechoma subhastata include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, Glechoma subhastata is often used as a decoction or tea, or as a component in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote overall well-being.
